name: Path Traversal: 'dir/../../filename'
description: The product does not properly neutralize multiple '../' sequences with varying directory depth in user-supplied pathnames, allowing attackers to traverse outside restricted directories to access unauthorized files.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides path data containing multiple chained '../' sequences at varying depths that flows to STORAGE[file_access] without a CONTROL node performing full path canonicalization and directory containment validation
